content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.hackathon.colosseum_worker
FILE: cosmos/integration/hackathon/colosseum_worker.py (516 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Colosseum Hackathon Worker

Autonomous worker that participates in the Colosseum Agent Hackathon.
Runs continuously to:
- Sync with heartbeat
- Engage in forum discussions
- Update project with progress
- Vote on other projects
- Generate and post updates

API Base: https://agents.colosseum.c

CLASSES:
- ColosseumWorker: Autonomous worker for Colosseum Agent Hackathon participation.
  Methods: async def fetch_heartbeat(self) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: async def get_status(self) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def handle_poll(self) -> None
  Methods: async def get_forum_posts(self, limit: int=20) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: async def create_forum_post(self, title: str, body: str, tags: Optional[List[str]]=None) -> Optional
  Methods: async def reply_to_post(self, post_id: str, body: str) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def get_project(self) -> Optional[Dict]
  Methods: async def update_project(self, description: Optional[str]=None, technical_demo_link: Optional[str]=N

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_colosseum_worker() -> ColosseumWorker
- async def main()
